title: Membrane nanowaves in single and collective cell migration.
author: Zouani OF Gocheva V Durrieu MC
content: S-EPMC4028249 PMC4028249 Membrane nanowaves in single and collective cell migration. We report the characterization of three-dimensional membrane waves for migrating single and collective cells and describe their propagation using wide-field optical profiling technique with nanometer resolution.
